23:29 â December 21, 2023
Audit on the File Exchange and Report Distribution Part
We reviewed all the information for accuracy, made some textual changes, and updated images and related procedures with current formatting standards.
Access and Administration Volume
File Exchange and Report Distribution Part
Section 1.5, File Exchange and Report Distribution Document Library
We removed the obsolete forms.
Section 4.1, Overview of Managing User Access to the File and Report Exchange
We removed the table with the User Management Summary, as this information was repetitive.
Section 4.2, User Management â Online Access via the Client Centre (Ontario Financial Institution Users)
We removed this section as the information is obsolete.
Section 4.2, User Management â Online Access via the Client Centre (Financial Institution Users)
We consolidated the user management procedures and clarified that if your financial institution has at least two existing CPS Admin Security Officers with administrative access to the File and Report Exchange, they can assign other CPS Admin Security Officers with personal and/or administrative access to the File and Report Exchange via User Management.
Section 5.2, Exchanging Files on the File and Report Exchange via Direct Connection (SFTP)
We added âEnter â22â as the Portâ to the instructions in the bulleted list.
Section 7.2, File and Report Exchange Folder Structure
We updated the folders that are available on the File and Report Exchange. We added the names of reports, files, statements, and summaries located in the folders.
